# LinBPQ Node Observation Pack Fixtures

These fixtures are synthetic placeholders unless a file explicitly says
`source manual-black-box`.

No GPL source was used to create these files. They are not authoritative LinBPQ
behaviour and do not claim compatibility. They exist to test KiloNode
compatibility tooling, manifest validation, coverage reporting, and transcript
replay plumbing.

Real observations must be captured later through black-box sessions against a
running process or externally visible packet boundary.
